campaign.title: Abu Dhabi Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure
campaign.description: Digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with $0.0125/kWh power economics
campaign.message:
Hi WMW team

We are opening a limited number of confidential conversations around an Abu Dhabi digital infrastructure opportunity in Bitcoin mining with strong structural power economics at $0.0125/kWh. The opportunity is infrastructure-led, execution-ready, and intended for a serious private-capital audience. Would you be open to a brief introduction?

Regards Jonas Freiwald

marketOpportunity.uaeLeadership: UAE generating 13 EH/s Bitcoin hashrate (3.7% of global); fastest-growing mining hub in Middle East
marketOpportunity.cryptoGrowth: UAE received $34B in crypto inflows (July 2023-June 2024); 42% YoY growth rate
marketOpportunity.regulatoryAdvantage: Abu Dhabi Global Market and Dubai Multi Commodities Centre supporting crypto; no personal income/capital gains tax on crypto profits
marketOpportunity.infrastructureMarket: GCC infrastructure market valued at $234.8B (2024), expected to reach $386.7B by 2033 (5.3% CAGR)
marketOpportunity.dealVolume: GCC deal value reached $72.7B across 554 transactions in 2025 (170% value increase vs 2024)

investorConcentration.sovereignWealthFunds: 5 major GCC SWFs manage ~$4.1 trillion; most active investors globally
investorConcentration.sectorFocus: Digital infrastructure, AI, energy transition, and data centers are top priorities
investorConcentration.dataCenter: Microsoft, BlackRock, DigitalBridge, ADQ all investing heavily in GCC data center expansion
investorConcentration.energyPartnership: Power infrastructure becoming critical for data center and AI infrastructure

competitiveAdvantages.costStructure: $0.0125/kWh power cost is extremely competitive for Bitcoin mining
competitiveAdvantages.geopoliticalStability: GCC region perceived as low-risk with decreasing equity risk premium
competitiveAdvantages.technicalSupport: Strong existing digital infrastructure, data centers, and technical expertise
competitiveAdvantages.capitalAvailability: Abundant capital in region; SWFs actively deploying $36B+ annually

phase1.target: Sovereign Wealth Funds (ADIA, Mubadala, PIF, ADQ, L'IMAD)
phase1.rationale: Largest capital pools; infrastructure mandates align; active in similar deals

phase2.rationale: Dedicated infrastructure expertise; active in data center/energy deals

phase3.rationale: Cryptocurrency expertise; understanding of asset economics
